name: Chocolate Bread Pudding (Finsand)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips in 1 cup of skim milk over medium heat.
2. Stir in the remaining milk. Set aside.
3. Beat eggs until frothy; add salt, sugar replacement, and vanilla extract. Beat well.
4. Stir egg mixture into chocolate/milk mixture.
5. Trim crust from bread and cut into small cubes.
6. Drop cubes into a greased 1 1/2-quart casserole or baking dish.
7. Pour chocolate mixture over the bread cubes; make sure to saturate all the cubes.
8. Set casserole in a pan of hot water.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour, or until pudding is completely set.
10. Serve warm or cold.
